chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْمُخْتَلِعَةِ وَ الْمُبَارِئَةِ وَ نَفَقَتِهِمَا وَ سُكْنَاهُمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – Waiting period of the women divorced by Al-Khul’a, and Al-Mubaraat, and their expenses, and their dwelling

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/242)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لِكُلِّ مُطَلَّقَةٍ مُتْعَةٌ إِلَّا الْمُخْتَلِعَةَ فَإِنَّهَا اشْتَرَتْ نَفْسَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Barqy, from Abu Al Bakhtary,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘For every divorced woman is a provision except for the woman divorced by Al-Khul’a, for she has bought herself’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Barqiy from abu al-Bakhtariy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, ‘Every divorced woman has the right to receive benefits except women in al-Khul‘ who purchase themselves.’”
